how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: Convert your files in three simple steps
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Drag & drop your file or click to select from your device. Your files are encrypted instantly.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Select your desired output format from over 60+ supported file types and conversion tools.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Click convert and download your processed file instantly. We never store your data.

footer.description: The ultimate privacy-first file converter. Process PDFs, images, and videos entirely in your browser with zero data collection.
